summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Centralita Virtual multi-tenant authentication system with JWT. Fixed critical frontend JavaScript errors and verified all authentication flows, tenant filtering, and protected endpoints.

design_issues.issue: Logout button not easily accessible in user interface

passed_tests: Login page loads with tenant info (santa-gadea)
Dashboard shows user name 'Administrador' in header
KPIs load from API (24 llamadas, 5 incidencias, 1 comunicado, 98% satisfaction)
Llamadas page loads with tenant-filtered data
Incidencias page loads with tenant-filtered data
Comunicados page loads with tenant-filtered data
API /api/kpis returns KPIs with auth header
